HomePage.title: The Most Powerful
HomePage.subtitle: Automate your clan management, track player stats, manage wars, and keep your community engaged.

cta.heading: Ready to Transform Your Clan?
cta.description: Join {serverCount}+ Discord servers already using ClashKing to elevate their Clash of Clans community. Setup takes just 2 minutes.
cta.trustBadge: Free forever • No credit card required • {serverCount}+ servers

features.title: Everything You Need to Manage Your Clan
features.subtitle: Powerful features designed specifically for Clash of Clans communities

autoRoles.title: Auto Role Management
autoRoles.description: Automatically assign roles based on player status, clan position, and achievements. Keep your server organized effortlessly.

playerStats.title: Player Statistics
playerStats.description: Track detailed player stats, progress graphs, and attack history. See who's improving and who needs help.

leaderboards.title: Leaderboards
leaderboards.description: Create competitive leaderboards for donations, trophies, war stars, and custom metrics. Boost engagement.

warTracking.title: War Tracking
warTracking.description: Monitor war lineups, track attacks in real-time, and get post-war analytics. Never miss a war detail.

smartReminders.title: Smart Reminders
smartReminders.description: Automated reminders for Clan Games, war attacks, Clan War League, and custom events. Keep everyone informed.

customization.title: Full Customization
customization.description: Customize commands, embed colors, nicknames, and permissions. Make ClashKing truly yours.

familyManagement.title: Family Management
familyManagement.description: Manage multiple clans as a family. Cross-clan stats, shared leaderboards, and unified roles.

analytics.title: Advanced Analytics
analytics.description: Deep insights into clan performance, player activity patterns, and growth trends. Data-driven decisions.

performance.title: Lightning Fast
performance.description: Built for performance with instant command responses and real-time updates. No lag, no delays.

security.title: Secure & Reliable
security.description: 99.9% uptime, encrypted data, and regular backups. Your clan data is safe with us.

footer.tagline: The most powerful Clash of Clans bot for Discord communities.

security.title: Security & Permissions

hero.title: Features
hero.subtitle: Discover the powerful tools ClashKing offers to help you manage and grow your clan across Discord, Mobile, and Web.

bot.title: ClashKing Bot
bot.description: ClashKing Bot is the only Discord bot you need to manage your Clash of Clans clan and community. It's packed with unique features to keep your clan organized, engaged, and growing.
items: Real-Time Logs: Track wars, CWL, clan games, raids, donations, and member events.
Ticketing System: Recruitment ticket system in addition to standard support tickets.
Auto Roles: Automatically assign roles based on clan status or family management.
Reminders: Send pings for war attacks, clan games, or anything else.
Detailed Stats: Insights into player and clan performance with activity tracking.
Roster Management: Organize and optimize your war rosters with ease.

app.title: ClashKing App (Open Beta)
app.description: ClashKing App is the perfect extension to the ClashKing Bot, bringing essential tools and insights directly to your mobile device. It helps you stay connected anytime, anywhere, even without Discord.
items: Real-Time Stats: Detailed stats for players and clans synced with the bot.
Clan Progress Tracking: Monitor your clan's progress over time seamlessly.
Multi account Management: Switch easily between your accounts and track performance.
Built-In History: Access historical data to analyze trends and improve strategies.
Discord Server Management: (Coming Soon) Manage roles and tickets from the app.
Advanced Notifications: (Coming Soon) Customize alerts for important events.

api.title: ClashKing API
api.description: Build your own tools or projects using the ClashKing API. It's free to use as long as you credit the ClashKing project.

HelpPage.title: Need Help?
HelpPage.subtitle: Whether you're looking for documentation or direct support, we've got you covered.

documentation.title: Documentation
documentation.description: Check out our comprehensive guides and command references to get the most out of ClashKing.

discord.title: Discord Support
discord.description: Need more help? Join our Discord community to ask questions, report bugs, or chat with other users.

OpenSourcePage.title: An Open Source Project
OpenSourcePage.subtitle: ClashKing is a totally free and open source project, and we believe in the power of community to make it even better. Both the bot and the API are fully open source, giving you the freedom to contribute or use them for your own projects.

github.title: GitHub Organization
github.description: Explore our source code, contribute to the bot, or check out our other open-source tools.

api.title: API Documentation
api.description: Build your own tools or projects using the ClashKing API. It's free to use as long as you credit the ClashKing project.

translation.title: Help Us Translate
translation.description: Help us translate ClashKing into your language! You can contribute to translating the website, the bot, and all related texts through our Crowdin projects.

contribute.title: Contribute
contribute.description: Help us improve by fixing bugs, adding new features, or enhancing existing ones. Every contribution counts!

community.title: Community
community.description: Join our Discord community to discuss ideas, get help, and collaborate with other developers.

learn.title: Learn
learn.description: Check out our documentation and examples to learn how to use the bot and API effectively.

SupportPage.title: Support Us
SupportPage.subtitle: ClashKing is a free, open-source project. Your support helps us keep the servers running and continue developing new features for the community.

patreon.title: Become a Patron
patreon.description: Support us monthly on Patreon to get exclusive perks, early access to features, and help cover our hosting costs.

creatorCode.title: Use Creator Code
creatorCode.description: Support us for free by using creator code
creatorCode.descriptionSuffix: in-game or in the Supercell Store.

whySupport.title: Why support us?
whySupport.description: Every contribution, no matter how small, goes directly towards server costs and API fees. Using our creator code costs you nothing extra but helps us immensely!

ServersPage.title: Select a Server
ServersPage.description: Choose a server to configure ClashKing bot settings

noServers.title: No Servers Found
noServers.description: You don't have admin permissions in any Discord servers.

AutoboardsPage.title: AutoBoards
AutoboardsPage.description: Automatically post and refresh clan, family, and legend boards
AutoboardsPage.createDialogDesc: Set up automatic posting or refreshing for a board
AutoboardsPage.editDialogDesc: Modify the configuration of this autoboard
AutoboardsPage.channelDesc: The channel where the autoboard will be posted
AutoboardsPage.postDaysDesc: Posts occur at 5:00 AM UTC daily reset time
AutoboardsPage.autoRefreshInfoDesc: The board will automatically refresh every 30-60 minutes with the latest data. Perfect for keeping stats current without manual updates.
AutoboardsPage.howItWorksDesc: AutoBoards can automatically post new boards on a schedule or continuously refresh existing boards with up-to-date data. Choose **Auto Post** to create new boards daily at specific days, or **Auto Refresh** to keep a board updated every 30-60 minutes.
AutoboardsPage.noAutoboardsDesc: Create your first AutoBoard to automate board updates

alerts.selectDays: Please select at least one day for auto-post
alerts.createFailed: Failed to create autoboard. Please try again.
alerts.updateFailed: Failed to update autoboard. Please try again.
alerts.deleteFailed: Failed to delete autoboard. Please try again.
